title: abutilon × aurantiacum
intro: Abutilon × aurantiacum, also known as the orange mallow or brightmaple, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, known for its vibrant orange, hibiscus-like flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Abutilon × aurantiacum include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
